case_title: NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. vs. HASKINS, MARY C.

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HASKINS, MARY C. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-06-1993
CASE TERMINATED: 30-MAR-93 TERM CODE: J JUDGEMENT FILED

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HASKINS, MARY C. $1,434.29 PRINCIPAL, $358.57 ATTORNEY FEES, $14.93 INTEREST, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,972.79 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION RE:DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS & ORDER THEREON, CREDIT OF $200.00 ON JUDGMENT FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.
DECLARATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST $35.04 FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HASKINS, MARY C.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $6.15 AS TO DEFENDANT HASKINS, MARY C.
